calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Part Re: Residuary Clause
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Roger Gross appearing for trustee. Court has received a Statement by Oakland Ballet Association declining acceptance of request. Court is granting the petition with Ailey Camp in place of Oakland Ballet. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Floyd Butler, CSR#2518. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Part Re: Residuary Clause
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Continued To Nov-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross (Counsel for David McCauley, Trustee).

After discussion concerning the existence/status of the Oakland Ballet Association and its ability, if any to receive a distribution from the Trust, the Court continued the matter to November 20, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 and requested additional documentation from Mr. Gross concerning the status of the Association.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722 ; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
